A produced backlog · 2014–2026

Twelve years of events, on the record.

Every seminar, summit, ceremony, study visit and breakfast I've produced or led at the Royal Swedish Academy of Engineering Sciences. Filter by year, format, or my role — nothing inflated, nothing hidden.

Flagship productions
Project Lead · 2022, 23, 25, 26

IVA's Annual Ceremony

IVA's most formal evening — the Högtidssammankomst in Stockholm City Hall's Golden Hall, with ceremony, banquet and ~1,200 guests in white tie. Project lead for the production.

Production & Technical Director · 2024–26

Entrepreneurship Summit

IVA's flagship summit bringing together founders, investors and decision-makers. Responsible for production and technical direction across the whole event.

Co-producer · since 2019

Prince Daniel's Entrepreneurship Day

The Fellowship's national gathering for young entrepreneurs, with HRH Prince Daniel. Co-producer of the day — stage, run-of-show and production.

Project Lead · since 2018

Prince Daniel's Fellowship

Entreprenörssamtal, Entreprenörsresor and school visits across Sweden — leading the production of the Fellowship's outreach programme, often with HRH Prince Daniel.
